Star Miss Teen India 2025

Registration Process:*
• Complete the registration form with accurate details.
• Review and accept the terms and conditions.
• Submit the registration fee.
• Upon payment, a confirmation message will be sent to your WhatsApp number.
• Receive valuable guidance from past winners or the reigning queen to help you excel in the auditions.
• The team will provide you with all the necessary details regarding the auditions.

Note: Passionate models are welcome! Apply only if you're genuinely committed, not for entertainment purposes.

Female

Registration Fee: ₹1500 + 18% GST

Star Entertainment Production: Elevating Dreams, Empowering Crowns – Shaping India’s Finest to Shine Globally and Conquer the World!
